clips.note: Pragmatist and Textualist clash over procedural traps versus strict rule text.
Four justices argue for reversal based on notice, rights, and precedent.
Foreperson frames debate while Pragmatist and Textualist argue over docket efficiency.
Federalism Hawk challenges Originalist on whether sovereignty overrides procedural rules.
Final exchange between Federalism Hawk and Originalist just before the verdict.
Pragmatist flips to reverse, conceding the arithmetic makes the rule unworkable.
